results.matched_effect_cluster: KVComm layer-wise selective KV sharing ICLR 2026
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — KVComm layer-wise selective KV pair selection by importance IS the category-bit gated layer-wise KV access mask.
EXACT TWIN — KVTuner layer-wise sensitivity-aware mixed-precision IS the bit-encoded category-cord layer-wise gating mechanism.
Entropy-guided per-layer KV cache budget allocation IS the layer-wise importance-gated KV access paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — SqueezeAttention 2D layer + sequence KV budget IS the layer-wise category-cord + per-token gate effect.
KVQuant bit-encoded KV quantization IS the per-token bit-encoded category-code KV storage scheme.
RetrievalAttention selective vector-search KV retrieval IS the selective re-tie promotion-demotion paradigm at vector-retrieval granularity.
TidalDecode position-anchored selective KV IS the position-bit knot additive bias + selective access mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Per-token KV bit-code with category-bit gating IS the KHIPU-GATE bit-encoded category-cord scheme.
